data_source_note: Refreshed 2026-06-27 via incognito headless Chromium. Syfe rates pulled DIRECT from product page (8/8 verified). Competitor rates pulled from StashAway HK aggregator HKD (22 Jun 2026) + USD (22 Jun 2026). Direct-scraping per provider is on the roadmap but most virtual banks publish rates only via their apps.
